name: HRC_SUBSCRIPTION_RUN_INFO
description: Represents subscription run details including the state of pagination for the current run and feed details.

columns.Name: RUN_INFO_ID
columns.Comments: Uniquely identifies a run details row.

columns.Name: RUN_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to "hrc_subscription_runs".RUN_ID.

columns.Name: FEED_PATH
columns.Comments: The path name for the collection or feed.

columns.Name: FEED_RETRIEVAL_TYPE
columns.Comments: Indicates the feed retreival date type

columns.Name: RETRIEVAL_DATE
columns.Comments: Indicates the last date and time of the minimum visited pagination update.

columns.Name: UPDATED_MIN
columns.Comments: Indicates the last date and time of the minimum visited pagination update.

columns.Name: PAGE_SIZE
columns.Comments: Indicates the last visited pagination page size value.

columns.Name: PAGE_NUM
columns.Comments: Indicates the last visited pagination page number value.

columns.Name: START_RETRIEVAL_DATE
columns.Comments: Indicates the start date and time of the minimum visited pagination update.

columns.Name: START_UPDATED_MIN
columns.Comments: Indicates the start date and time of the minimum visited pagination update.

columns.Name: START_PAGE_SIZE
columns.Comments: Indicates the start visited pagination page size value.

columns.Name: START_PAGE_NUM
columns.Comments: Indicates the start visited pagination page number value.

columns.Name: ENTRY_COUNT
columns.Comments: Determines the number of entries count for the run.

columns.Name: ERROR_COUNT
columns.Comments: Determines the number of entries error count for the run.

columns.Name: FILTER_COUNT
columns.Comments: Determines the number of entries filter count for the run.

columns.Name: RETRY_COUNT
columns.Comments: Determines the count of retries for the same run with the same status and no new entries found.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
